scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:dist: rm -rf bin && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.deploy:server: npm run typecheck --prefix server && railway up --detach
scripts.deploy:client: cd client && VITE_BACKEND_URL=https://backend-production-370a.up.railway.app npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=agentic-collaboration-demo --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:server && npm run deploy:client
